sin(x^2)可以嚴謹證明佢個indefinite integral 係唔可以我哋見開啲elementary functions加減乘除次方開N次方組成。

詳情請Google "integration in finite terms"

我想問清楚少少野
int f(x) = F(x) + C

不可積分
即係
不能夠被積分
還是
可以被積分 只不過無法用初等函數表達出F(x)
& 無法用現有基本積分方式計算出來

另外有冇啲f(x)喺indefinite integral時無法被計算
但喺definite integral時可以被計算出來
或情況相反

好亂

Here's five integration methods
http://www.mathwords.com/u/u_substitution.htm
u-Substitution

http://www.mathwords.com/i/integration_by_parts.htm
by parts(另外eg.3有用到將個 I 變成 2I 最後成舊除2)

http://www.mathwords.com/p/partial_fractions.htm
partial fractions

http://www.mathwords.com/t/trig_substitution.htm
trig Substitution (唔識呢個😅😅😅)

http://www.mathwords.com/r/rationalizing_substitution.htm
Rationalizing Substitutions (另外有用到divided by long division)

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Conjugate_(square_roots)
仲有可以將分數rationalize (乘以分母的conjugate/conjugate)
1/(a+b) 變成 1/(a+b) * (a-b)/(a-b) = (a-b) / (a^2 -b^2)

https://zh.wikipedia.org/zh-hk/雙曲函數
http://math2.org/math/integrals/more/tanh.htm
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Integration_using_Euler%27s_formula
仲有可以將個sin cos數變成e^(pi * i) 再integrate (唔識呢個😅😅😅)

http://www.mathnotes.org/?pid=109#?pid=109
仲有imaginary number點樣integrate (唔識呢個😅😅😅)

係咪我理解錯咗 求指點
如是者 |x-1| |x-2| |x-3| 分拆開 x-1 or 1-x; x-2 or 2-x; x-3 or 3-x
例如 (x-1)/(2-x)(3-x) ; (1-x)/(3-x)(x-2) ... 8 combination

最後發現答案只會係 正負x-1 or 正負(x-1)/(2x-5)
所以分開4個(2對正負)各自做integration

俾題數你地玩下:

We know that
arctan(x) = x - x^3/3 + x^5/5 - x^7/7 + ... for |x| < 1

Prove that:

pi/4 = 1 - 1/3 + 1/5 - 1/7 + 1/9 - 1/11 + ...

abel’s theorem
hkcee out syl
